name: Pro(v|b)ably secure
description:
We have probable intel that our target tried to prove their flag?!

As you can see in the leaked sources, the admin user
placed a flag into a model. It is vital that you get access to their
account and recover the flag.

We are also very excited to tell you that our agents are certain that
you don't have to touch anything related to the prover itself, just
recover the flag and get out of this hell as quickly as possible!
